entries.title: About the Course
entries.content: Students study various natural features of Canada's provinces and territories and create a detailed, illustrated map over the course of the year. They also read a travelogue from the year's historical period.

entries.title: Placement & Combining Tips
entries.content: The Canadian mapping exercises are the same each year, but the reading component changes for each of the historical time periods.

rows.label: Geography: Grade 8 (Canada)
rows.books: Canadian Student Atlas, Draw the Natural Wonders of Canada and Greenland: Geography Disguised as Fun, Student World Atlas 6th Ed., Vanished Beyond the Map
